sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Stryker says manufacturing mostly restored after cyberattack
feed.summary: Medical device manufacturer Stryker announced that its operations are largely restored following a cyberattack on March 11 that disrupted order processing, manufacturing, and shipments. The company's stock rose 2% as it confirmed most critical production lines are back online. An Iran-linked hacking group, Handala, claimed responsibility for the attack.

feed.title: Brighthouse Financial (BHF) Rating Reinstated by Keefe, Bruyette & Woods | BHF Stock News
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods has reinstated its "Market Perform" rating for Brighthouse Financial (BHF) with a new price target of $67.00 USD. This update follows several recent rating changes from other firms and provides investors with fresh insights into the company's expected performance. Wall Street analysts currently forecast an average target price of $66.00 for BHF, implying a 9.04% upside from its current price, while GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $106.52, suggesting a 75.98% upside.

feed.title: Coca-Cola celebrates America 250 with special bottles
feed.summary: Coca-Cola is releasing limited-edition bottles to celebrate America's 250th birthday, partnering with the America250 organization for nationwide events leading up to July 4th. This initiative mirrors a similar release for the 1976 U.S. bicentennial, with production already underway in Utah for distribution across the country. Coca-Cola aims to amplify its mission of "Refresh the World and Make a Difference" through this partnership.

feed.title: Globe Life (NYSE:GL) Given Outperform Rating at Keefe, Bruyette & Woods
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods has reiterated an "outperform" rating for Globe Life (NYSE:GL) with a $168 price target, indicating a potential 21.9% upside. While the company missed recent quarterly earnings and revenue estimates, it demonstrated strong margins and provided solid FY2026 EPS guidance. Insider selling by CMO and CEO was noted, but institutional ownership remains high.

feed.title: Jefferies Financial Group Cuts Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH) Price Target to $54.00
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group has reduced its price target for Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH) to $54.00 from $57.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating. This new target implies a potential upside of 33.78% from the stock's current price, despite the wider Street consensus being a "Hold" with an average target of $43.17. The adjustment follows Enphase Energy's quarterly earnings report, where it beat EPS estimates but saw revenue decline by 10.3% year-over-year, leading to a 5.1% drop in shares.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Has Lowered Expectations for Verra Mobility (NASDAQ:VRRM) Stock Price
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has reduced its price target for Verra Mobility (NASDAQ:VRRM) from $21 to $19, while maintaining a "neutral" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of approximately 29% from the stock's previous close. Despite missing EPS estimates by $0.02, the company exceeded revenue expectations and provided FY2026 guidance of $1.32–1.38 EPS, leading to a consensus "Hold" rating among analysts with an average target of $23.50.

feed.title: More than 33 million people now bank on Wells Fargo’s mobile app
feed.summary: Wells Fargo announced significant digital milestones, including its AI-powered virtual assistant, Fargo, surpassing 1 billion interactions in less than three years. Additionally, the company recorded over 33 million mobile active users last month, demonstrating growing customer adoption of its digital banking platform. These achievements highlight how customers are increasingly using Wells Fargo's digital tools for everyday financial needs, with Fargo especially benefiting Spanish-speaking users.

feed.title: Cisco Systems, Inc. Stock: Navigating AI-Driven Growth and Defensive Appeal in a Volatile Tech Lands
feed.summary: Cisco Systems, Inc. is highlighted for its resilience and strategic shift from hardware to AI-enhanced software services, driven by innovations in AI security and strong financial performance. The company offers defensive appeal for North American investors with reliable dividends, consistent growth in software subscriptions, and robust cash flows. While positioned for AI-driven growth, potential risks include margin pressures and competition, requiring investors to monitor guidance and innovation closely.

feed.title: Hershey's Releases New Dark Chocolate Raspberry Decadence Nuggets
feed.summary: Hershey's has expanded its Nuggets lineup by introducing the new Dark Chocolate Raspberry Decadence, combining dark chocolate with a raspberry-flavored creme filling. These new candies are currently available online and are expected to appear in major grocery chains soon. This release follows other recent Hershey's innovations like Shaq-A-Licious Slams and a Dubai-Inspired Chocolate Bar.

feed.title: Dow's 168-point fall led by losses in shares of NVIDIA Corp., Goldman Sachs
feed.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell by 168 points, primarily driven by declines in shares of NVIDIA Corp. and Goldman Sachs. This indicates a negative day for the index, with these two prominent companies contributing significantly to the overall market downturn.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. Stock: Da Vinci Systems Drive Long-Term Growth in Robotic Surgery Market
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (ISIN: US46120E6023) is a leader in robotic-assisted surgery with its da Vinci platform, offering investors exposure to growing minimally invasive procedures. The company's core business model relies on system sales, instruments, accessories, and services, creating a recurring revenue stream. Its competitive moat is strengthened by extensive surgeon training programs, a vast data ecosystem, and strong patent protection, making it a key player in the expanding robotic surgery market despite increasing competition.

feed.title: Investors Purchase High Volume of CF Industries Call Options (NYSE:CF)
feed.summary: Investors purchased a significantly higher volume of call options for CF Industries (NYSE:CF) on Thursday, with volumes 37% above average, as the stock rose 2.8%. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue. Despite insider selling activity, institutional investors hold a substantial stake, and analysts currently have a consensus "Hold" rating with an average price target of $104.60.

feed.title: AXT Sees Unusually High Options Volume (NASDAQ:AXTI)
feed.summary: AXT (NASDAQ:AXTI) experienced unusually high options trading volume on Thursday, with traders purchasing 15,725 call options, a 92% increase over the typical daily volume. This activity comes amidst significant insider selling by CEO Morris S. Young and Director Jesse Chen, alongside mixed analyst ratings and the company missing its recent quarterly earnings and revenue estimates.

feed.title: Ross Stores (NASDAQ:ROST) Reaches New 1-Year High - Time to Buy?
feed.summary: Ross Stores (NASDAQ:ROST) recently achieved a new 52-week high of $217.51, following strong quarterly results that surpassed expectations, with EPS of $2.00 and revenue of $6.64 billion. Several analysts have raised their price targets, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating. The company also increased its quarterly dividend to $0.445, signaling positive financial health despite recent insider share sales.

feed.title: A Look At Bank Of Montreal’s (TSX:BMO) Valuation As Investor Focus Splits On Fair Value Estimates
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (TSX:BMO) has seen mixed short-term share performance, with a 0.9% gain over the past day but a 2.8% decline over the past month. Despite this, longer-term momentum remains solid with a 41.6% one-year return. Analysts present differing valuations, with one narrative suggesting BMO is 16.2% overvalued at CA$163.00, while a DCF model implies it is 34% undervalued at CA$287.61.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Lowers Jefferies Financial Group (JEF) Price Targe
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has reiterated its "Buy" rating for Jefferies Financial Group (JEF) but has lowered its price target from $54 to $47, a 12.96% decrease. This adjustment, released on March 26, 2026, reflects updated expectations while maintaining confidence in the company. Other analysts have also recently adjusted their price targets for JEF, with the average target price from 5 analysts being $54.20, suggesting a potential upside of 36.25% from its current price of $39.78.

feed.title: This New Perk for Amex’s Business Cards Is a Big Bet on the Future of AI
feed.summary: American Express has introduced a new perk for its U.S. Business Platinum and Business Gold cards: a $300 annual statement credit for ChatGPT Business subscriptions. This initiative reflects Amex's belief in the growing importance of AI in enterprise and aims to help small business owners save time and increase productivity. The credit could cover ChatGPT access for up to a dozen employees annually, aligning with Amex's observations that AI significantly benefits businesses.

feed.title: HPE Stock Today: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Holds Near Highs After Evercore Target Lift
feed.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) shares pulled back slightly after two strong sessions, but continue to hold near recent highs. This follows Evercore ISI raising its price target on HPE to $30 due to stronger CPU-driven server demand, acknowledging HPE's significant AI backlog exceeding $5 billion. The article highlights the broader market trend of investors focusing on companies providing essential AI infrastructure beyond just chipmakers, despite ongoing challenges with supply costs and the Juniper deal risk.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal targets 15% return on equity on wealth, US businesses growth
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (BMO) aims for a return on equity exceeding 15% by 2028, driven by growth in its wealth management and U.S. businesses. CEO Darryl White emphasized the bank's strong North American capital markets and long-term strategy amidst geopolitical tensions. This target follows a 12.1% first-quarter return on equity, showcasing the bank's efficiency in generating shareholder profit.

feed.title: Best Buy Stock Surges as FY26 Earnings Impress Amid Uncertainty
feed.summary: Best Buy's stock surged by 4.54% following its strong fiscal year 2026 Q4 earnings report, which exceeded adjusted earnings per share expectations. Despite slight revenue shortfalls and cautious FY27 guidance, the company's strategic focus on cost management, high-margin initiatives, and robust capital return programs have bolstered investor confidence. Analysts maintain "buy" recommendations, acknowledging the company's resilience in navigating uncertain market conditions.

feed.title: Matthew Kirk takes over as AXIS Chief Financial Officer
feed.summary: AXIS Capital Holdings Limited has announced that Matthew Kirk has officially taken over as Chief Financial Officer, effective March 31, 2026. Kirk, who has nearly 30 years of insurance experience, previously served as Group CFO at Enstar Group Limited. He succeeds Peter J. Vogt, who is departing AXIS after 16 years with the company.

feed.title: Kroger Offers 4X Fuel Points On 2 Spring Weekends
feed.summary: Kroger is offering 4X Fuel Points on two spring weekends, March 27-29 and April 3-5, allowing customers to earn four times the fuel points on groceries and eligible purchases. This promotion, activated via a digital or in-store coupon, aims to help families save on travel expenses. Boost by Kroger Plus members will receive 5X fuel points during these events, while standard loyalty members earn 1X, with additional points available for gift card purchases and prescription fills.

feed.title: Decades-Old Paper Hailing Baby Powder Safety Retracted by Lancet
feed.summary: The Lancet has retracted a 1977 paper that claimed talc, the main ingredient in Johnson & Johnson's baby powder, was safe. The retraction comes after it was revealed that the author, Francis J C Roe, was a J&J consultant and that the company reviewed the manuscript before its original publication. This development relates to the numerous lawsuits against J&J linking its baby powder to cancer.

feed.title: Should Texas Pacific Land's (TPL) Pivot Into Permian Data Centers Prompt a Rethink of Its Royalty Model?
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land Corporation (TPL) recently invested US$50 million to develop data centers in the Permian Basin, diversifying its revenue beyond traditional oil and gas royalties. This move could reshape its investment narrative by adding infrastructure monetization, but its core business remains Permian royalties and water services. While this offers new optionality, investors should also consider valuation risks and the concentration of its Permian exposure.

feed.title: BofA (BAC) sells $7.5M 5.50% callable notes maturing 2046
feed.summary: Bank of America Corporation (BAC) is issuing $7.5 million in Fixed Rate Callable Notes with a 5.50% annual interest rate, maturing on March 26, 2046. Interest will be paid monthly, starting April 26, 2026, and the notes are callable by BofA starting March 26, 2029. These senior unsecured obligations are not listed on any exchange and are subject to the bank's credit risk.

feed.title: Is Motorola’s AI‑Orchestrated Security Push Reshaping The Investment Case For Motorola Solutions (MSI)?
feed.summary: Motorola Solutions recently expanded its AI-enabled physical security offerings, including the 'Operator' orchestration layer and enhanced visual alerts, at ISC West 2026. This move aims to transform security infrastructure into a real-time intelligence layer, automating incident response and strengthening compliance for enterprises. The company's investment narrative is shifting further towards high-margin, software-driven platforms, with a focus on integrated AI security and recurring cloud solutions as key growth drivers.

feed.title: What Abbott Laboratories (ABT)'s Cancer Screening Deal and Libre Data Reveal About Its Chronic Care Ambitions
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories has recently completed a significant acquisition of Exact Sciences for approximately US$23 billion, expanding its presence in cancer diagnostics, particularly with the Cologuard test. Concurrently, new clinical trial data indicates that its FreeStyle Libre continuous glucose monitoring system improves glucose control for Type 2 diabetes patients using basal insulin. These developments underscore Abbott's strategic focus on long-term chronic disease management and prevention in both diabetes and oncology, reinforcing its investment narrative around high-impact medical technology.

feed.title: Assessing KLA (KLAC) Valuation After US Semiconductor Investment Consortium Boosts Sentiment
feed.summary: KLA (KLAC) is receiving fresh attention due to a proposed US semiconductor investment consortium. While KLA's stock has shown strong momentum over the past year, a recent pullback and its current valuation of US$202.4 billion, slightly above Vestra's fair value of $1,498, raise questions about whether its future growth is already priced in. The valuation relies on a 35x Forward P/E multiple applied to 2027 projected Adjusted EPS, but risks include softening advanced packaging demand and trade disruptions.

feed.title: EQT Upsizes $1.4b Debt Tender As Shares Trade Near Targets
feed.summary: EQT (NYSE:EQT) has completed a $1.4 billion cash tender offer for senior notes, enhancing its debt reduction efforts. The company's stock has seen significant positive momentum, reflecting investor confidence in its capital management decisions. This tender offer aims to retire higher-cost debt and streamline near-term obligations, aligning with EQT's capital discipline strategy.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To Ecolab (ECL) Digital Push, CoolIT Deal, And JPMorgan Upgrade Amid Tensions
feed.summary: Ecolab (ECL) is expanding its digital offerings and data center cooling capabilities through recent initiatives like presenting at the Connected Worker: Energy Summit and acquiring CoolIT Systems. JPMorgan upgraded Ecolab's stock rating, reinforcing confidence in the company's long-term strategy, despite ongoing geopolitical tensions that typically influence market sentiment. Investors should weigh the potential for increased margins from digital services against risks from softer demand in heavy industrial markets.

feed.title: A Look At Alibaba Group Holding (NYSE:BABA) Valuation As Investors Debate Undervalued Giant Versus Priced‑In Growth
feed.summary: Alibaba Group Holding (NYSE:BABA) has seen mixed recent trading, with a 3.5% gain over the past day, yet declines over the past month and three months. While a popular narrative suggests Alibaba is undervalued with a fair value of $254 based on a forward earnings framework, its current P/E ratio of 21.6x is slightly above the industry average. This presents a debate among investors on whether the company is truly an undervalued giant or if its future growth is already priced in.

feed.title: Why Lennox International Shares Are Sinking Now
feed.summary: Lennox International (LII) shares are declining due to weakened fundamentals, including a significant 23% volume drop in its Home Comfort segment and reduced full-year earnings guidance. These issues stem from ongoing residential HVAC industry challenges and margin concerns. Investor sentiment is further impacted by technical sell signals and institutional investors reducing their positions.

feed.title: Netflix, Inc. Stock Gains Traction on NASDAQ with Analyst Upgrade to Buy Rating Amid Streaming Sector Resilience
feed.summary: Netflix, Inc. shares gained 1.5% on NASDAQ to $92.52 following an upgrade from Hold to Buy by Erste Group, driven by strong revenue growth expectations for 2026. This analyst action highlights Netflix's competitive edge in the streaming sector and its resilience amid market volatility. The company's strategic moves into live events and ad-supported tiers are bolstering investor confidence, reflected in a consensus Moderate Buy rating.

feed.title: Arista Networks Inc Stock (ANET) Moved Down by 5.98% on Mar 26: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Arista Networks (ANET) saw its stock price drop by 5.98% on March 26, primarily due to recent insider selling by executives like Kenneth Duda and Yvonne Wassenaar, and mixed activity from institutional investors. Despite overall positive analyst sentiment and strong financial performance, concerns about the company's elevated valuation and increasing competition in the AI networking sector also contributed to the decline. Technical indicators showed a sell signal, and the company maintains a high level of media attention.

feed.title: Amazon offers $1,000 prizes for drivers who say why they love their job
feed.summary: Amazon is offering $1,000 prizes to delivery drivers from its subcontracted network who share stories about why they love their jobs in a "My Why" competition. This initiative comes as Amazon faces scrutiny over driver working conditions and its classification of these workers as non-employees. Drivers are asked to consent to Amazon using their submissions for promotional activities, a move some critics like NYC driver Jerome Sloss view as a way to improve Amazon's image amid legal challenges to its DSP model.

feed.title: Amgen Inc. Stock: Steady Biotech Leader with Strong Dividend Yield and Institutional Backing for Nor
feed.summary: Amgen Inc. (ISIN: US0311621009) is presented as a resilient biotechnology company for North American investors, focusing on innovative therapies and offering a strong dividend yield. The article highlights Amgen's robust financial position, diversified product pipeline, and appeal to income-oriented investors due to its consistent dividend payments and institutional backing. It also discusses the company's competitive landscape, risks like patent expirations and regulatory changes, and its strong market position within oncology, inflammation, and rare diseases.

feed.title: Adobe, PayPal, UnitedHealth Just Got 2X ETFs — Direxion Builds Out The Leverage Trade
feed.summary: Direxion has launched four new single-stock leveraged ETFs offering 2X daily exposure to Adobe, PayPal, Texas Instruments, and UnitedHealth. These funds are designed for tactical traders looking to capitalize on near-term momentum in specific high-profile stocks. The introduction of these high-octane ETFs reflects a growing interest in single-stock trading strategies, moving away from passive index investing, but they also carry elevated risks.

feed.title: Direxion每日二倍做多人工智慧與大數據ETF-AIBU-ETF淨值表格
feed.summary: This article provides the net asset value (NAV) table for the Direxion Daily AI and Big Data Bull 2X ETF (NYSE:AIBU). It includes current market price and NAV, along with a detailed list of daily NAVs and market prices for the past 30 days. The page also offers disclaimers regarding performance calculations and investment risks associated with the ETF.

feed.title: When your first-class ‘flight’ turns out to be a bus ride
feed.summary: Passengers booking flights, sometimes even first-class, are increasingly finding themselves on buses instead, a practice utilized by airlines to connect smaller airports to larger hubs. American Airlines, for example, has been using The Landline Company for such bus "flights" since 2022. This shift can lead to unexpected travel experiences for passengers who complete all typical airport procedures only to board a bus.

feed.title: Susquehanna Lowers Price Target for Alibaba (BABA) to $170 | BAB
feed.summary: Susquehanna has maintained a 'Positive' rating for Alibaba (BABA) but lowered its price target from $190 to $170, a 10.53% reduction. This adjustment follows several other financial analysts who have also reduced their price targets for BABA recently. Despite these reductions, the overall outlook from Wall Street analysts remains cautiously optimistic, with an average target price implying a significant upside from its current trading price.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings after realignment (NVDA) — reports 0 shares
feed.summary: Vanguard Group has filed an amendment (Schedule 13G/A) reporting zero beneficial ownership of NVIDIA Corp common stock. This change is due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their beneficial ownership separately, aligning with SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing clarifies that this is a reporting restructure, not a sale of shares, and subsequent filings from individual subsidiaries will show their respective positions.

feed.title: eBay Launches 48-Hour Livestream Shopping Event Featuring Celebrities, Rare Finds, and $1 Starting Bids
feed.summary: eBay has launched "48 Hours of Drops," a livestream shopping event running through March 27, featuring pre-loved fashion, collectibles, and exclusive inventory. The event includes appearances by celebrities like La La Anthony, Maura Higgins, Xolo Maridueña, and Jared McCain, offering items such as Hermès bags starting at $1, rare sports cards, vintage Pokémon booster packs, and celebrity closet cleanouts for charity. Viewers can engage in real-time bidding and secure unique pieces while supporting various causes.

feed.title: Costco Membership: The Core Driver of Resilient Retail Growth and Investor Stability
feed.summary: Costco's membership model provides a stable, high-margin revenue stream, insulating the company from economic pressures and driving customer loyalty. With over 90% renewal rates and membership fees constituting a significant portion of operating income, this model offers investors a defensive play in a volatile retail market. The focus on membership ensures consistent growth and a competitive advantage against rivals.

feed.title: The Celsius Stock Selloff Shows How Costco Can Impact Any Business
feed.summary: Celsius Holdings stock is experiencing its worst monthly performance since January 2022. This downturn is attributed to Wall Street's concerns that Costco Wholesale's introduction of an inexpensive energy drink could negatively affect demand for Celsius products. The article highlights how a major retailer like Costco can significantly impact other businesses.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips stock price forecast: Uptrend and overbought signals as COP surges 3.05% to $132.86
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips (COP) stock surged 3.05% to $132.86, indicating strong bullish momentum with its price well above key moving averages. The company is considering selling Permian Basin assets worth $2 billion to optimize its portfolio, and a senior executive recently sold 7,700 shares for approximately $1 million. While technical indicators show persistent strength, some signals suggest overbought conditions, leading one expert to advise caution for aggressive long positions unless $131.65 is breached.

feed.title: SRPT: Citigroup Raises Price Target Amid Maintained 'Sell' Ratin
feed.summary: Citigroup has maintained its 'Sell' rating on Sarepta Therapeutics (SRPT) while significantly increasing its price target from USD 9.00 to USD 13.00, a 44.44% boost. This adjustment reflects changing market conditions and expectations for SRPT, despite other analysts having "Outperform" or "Overweight" ratings with higher price targets. The average target price from 25 analysts is $30.24, implying a potential upside of 37.95% from the current price, with a "Hold" consensus from 26 brokerage firms.

feed.title: Gartner (NYSE:IT) Price Target Cut to $166.00 by Analysts at UBS Group
feed.summary: UBS Group analysts have reduced their price target for Gartner (NYSE:IT) from $180.00 to $166.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 7.62% from the current stock price. Other analysts have also adjusted their targets for Gartner, leading to a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of $189.30 for the information technology services provider.

feed.title: Is Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) one of the best conservative stocks to buy right now?
feed.summary: This article evaluates Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) as a potential conservative stock investment. It aims to determine if TMO's financial performance and market position make it an attractive option for investors seeking stability.

feed.title: Systane Eye Drops: Alcon's Leading Solution for Dry Eye Relief in North America
feed.summary: Systane eye drops, produced by Alcon, offer fast and long-lasting relief for dry and irritated eyes, a common issue in North America exacerbated by screen time and environmental factors. The product utilizes a unique gel-forming technology for extended hydration and is a significant part of Alcon's consumer health portfolio. Its strong market position and brand loyalty contribute to Alcon's stable revenue and shareholder value, appealing to investors in the resilient eye care sector.

feed.title: Sarepta Therapeutics Is Maintained at Sell by Citigroup
feed.summary: Citigroup has reiterated its "Sell" rating for Sarepta Therapeutics (SRPT). This maintenance of a negative outlook indicates the firm's continued skepticism regarding the company, despite potential market developments. The analyst's current stance suggests that challenges or fundamental concerns may persist for Sarepta.
